mapper.select: SELECT * FROM prize_point_setting WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} ORDER BY rank ASC
SELECT * FROM prize_point_setting WHERE tournament_id = #{tournamentId} AND rank = #{rank} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO prize_point_setting (tournament_id, rank, point) VALUES
(#{item.tournamentId}, #{item.rank}, #{item.point})
